title: Internal error in V3Param.cpp: Could not find array index in unlinked text

features.name: interface array hierarchical access via generate loop index
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a for loop where an interface array is accessed through a hierarchical path using the loop index variable
features.snippet: generate genvar i; for (i = 0; i < N; i++) begin: g node_port ports_up[4](); assign x = nodes_h[i].ports_up[0]; end endgenerate

features.name: nested generate loops with interface array port connection
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops with genvar variables, where an interface array declared in an inner generate is connected through hierarchical references using both loop indices
features.snippet: generate genvar i, j; for (i = 0; i < H; i++) begin: h for (j = 0; j < W; j++) begin: w node_port ports_up[4](); end end endgenerate
